executives.name: Harry Burgess
executives.background: Mr. Burgess is a mining engineer with over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. He is a co-founder of Micon International Limited and has been involved in the evaluation and development of numerous mineral projects worldwide.

executives.name: Jorge Estepa
executives.background: Mr. Estepa is a corporate secretary and administrator with over 25 years of experience in the administration of publicly traded companies. He has served as an officer and director of several resource companies.
